## Checklist
- [ ] I have read `CONTRIBUTING.md`
- [ ] My branch is up to date with `main`
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, …)
- [ ] New backend code includes at least one happy-path and one error-path test
- [ ] `pytest tests/ -v` passes locally
- [ ] `npm run lint && npm run build` passes locally (if frontend changed)
- [ ] No large binary files (`.pkl`, `.joblib`, `.csv`) are included in this PR
- [ ] I have updated relevant documentation (`README.md`, `docs/`, docstrings)
